subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who uttered the First Word and caused thereby the people of Bahá to speak forth in the kingdom of creation! He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نطق بالکلمه الاولی و انطق بها اهل البهاء فی ملکوت الانشاء انه لا
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital, @the power of words; of speech, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @love of God
